frontmatter.title: Kohoii

frontmatter.note: gender neutral term for someone who is young. equivalent to the english words "boy" or "girl"
frontmatter.title: yiim

frontmatter.note: i.e. to pass something along, or to another
frontmatter.title: weilasii

frontmatter.note: as opposed to vaesii - to look (at something)
frontmatter.title: taerasii

frontmatter.note: i.e. do rei dosa - red, like fire. (lit. fire-like red)
frontmatter.title: rei

frontmatter.note: added as a prefix before certain pronouns to indicate a relative clause
frontmatter.title: ot

frontmatter.note: from niinii and miirniil, lit. "infant bed"
frontmatter.title: niimiirniil

frontmatter.note: only used in regards to clothes
frontmatter.title: mosadesii

frontmatter.definition: to persevere and succeed, to "make it through" something
frontmatter.title: kousii

frontmatter.definition: zero / 0, none / devoid of / absent of
frontmatter.title: kii

frontmatter.note: i.e. leivka - dreamy, from leiv - dream
frontmatter.title: ka

frontmatter.note: usually in regard to an instrument.
frontmatter.title: hana

frontmatter.note: only used in regards to sleep
frontmatter.title: haeya

frontmatter.note: added as a suffix to verbs (after removing “sii”) to turn it into a noun that does that action.
frontmatter.title: hae

frontmatter.note: as in, “i can’t even begin to understand”. basically just used to emphasize something surprising or extreme.
frontmatter.title: gobu

frontmatter.note: added as a suffix to a noun to denote the genitive case
frontmatter.title: fel
